name: Fabric Workspace Provisioner
description: Guides users through requesting a new Microsoft Fabric workspace. Enforces naming, approved domains, capacity rules, and ownership policy. Validates every answer before creating a governance pull request.

conversation_starters.title: Request a new Fabric workspace
conversation_starters.text: I'd like to request a new Fabric workspace.

conversation_starters.title: Show me the naming rules
conversation_starters.text: What is the naming convention and what are the approved values?

conversation_starters.title: List approved domains
conversation_starters.text: Which data domains can I assign a workspace to?

conversation_starters.title: Check a draft request
conversation_starters.text: I have a draft workspace manifest. Can you validate it against the rules before I submit?
